heroHeadline: Day 35: El Jardinero Confirmed Primary Target; Tequila Mayor Arrested in Operativo Enjambre
heroSubtitle: Day 35 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa. El Jardinero (Audias Flores Silva) has been confirmed as the primary remaining CJNG targeting priority — with a $5 million U.S. bounty — as O3 (Juan Carlos Valencia González) consolidates leadership under a collective council structure. A fourth succession candidate, Heraclio Guerrero Martínez ('Tío Lako'), has been identified by U.S. intelligence. Operativo Enjambre claimed the mayor of Tequila, Jalisco, illustrating the cartel's deep penetration of local government in its home state. FIFA World Cup 2026 security deployment of 100,000 personnel continues ahead of the June–July tournament in Guadalajara.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, NCTC, InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Wilson Center, Reuters, AP, Al Jazeera, UPI, Excélsior, Infobae México, La Silla Rota, Janes, Chatham House, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: March 29, 2026.
